text:
## Team Context

**Your assigned name**: spec-developer-frontend-features
**Team Lead**: team-lead (use SendMessage to reach it)

**Communication Protocol** (you have SendMessage in your tools):
- `QUESTION: ...` — before starting, if requirements have genuine ambiguity
- `BLOCKER: ...` — immediately if you cannot proceed
- `DONE: {summary}` — when your deliverables are complete
- `SUGGESTION: ...` — proactively flag tech issues, arch concerns, refactoring ideas

**Context Strategy**: repomix
All relevant context is pre-loaded. Use Read/Glob/Grep for additional files.

**Escalation rule**: Do NOT work silently on ambiguity. Ask first.
**Team culture**: Your domain expertise is valued. Speak up.

## Tasks (6 tasks, do them all sequentially)

### Task 1: notesaner-cux — Inline Comment Display in Editor
Render comment threads anchored to text selections in editor.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Comment highlights in editor: text range with yellow background
- Comment popover on click showing thread
- Reply within popover
- Resolve thread button
- Author avatars and timestamps in thread
- @mention user in comment with autocomplete
- Unresolved comment count badge
- Comments panel shows all threads in order
- Comment mode toggle: show/hide highlights

### Task 2: notesaner-6z2 — Note Properties Editor (Frontmatter UI)
Visual editor for note frontmatter (YAML properties).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Properties panel in right sidebar
- Display all frontmatter key-value pairs
- Edit values inline (text, date picker, number)
- Type detection: auto-detect string, number, boolean, date, array
- Add new property via + button
- Delete property
- Special properties: title, tags, aliases (with dedicated UI)
- Array values shown as tags/chips
- Changes saved to frontmatter on note save

### Task 3: notesaner-ofrr — Presence Indicators (Who Is Viewing)
Show which users are currently viewing each note.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Presence bar at top of editor: avatar thumbnails of active editors
- Tooltip on avatar: name, cursor position description
- Presence in file explorer: dot indicator on notes being edited
- Workspace-level presence: status in member list
- Online/offline status indicator
- Idle detection: mark as away after 5 min inactivity
- Maximum shown: 5 avatars + N more

### Task 4: notesaner-kl1 — Per-Tab Navigation History (Back/Forward)
Browser-like navigation history per editor tab.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Back button navigates to previously viewed note
- Forward button navigates forward in history
- History tracked per tab independently
- Keyboard shortcuts: Alt+Left (back), Alt+Right (forward)
- History preserved across splits
- History stored in memory (Zustand)
- Max 50 history entries per tab
- Visual indicator when history is available

### Task 5: notesaner-2xhf — Mobile-Responsive Layout
Responsive adaptation for mobile browsers.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Breakpoints: mobile (<640px), tablet (640-1024px), desktop (>1024px)
- Mobile: single pane, bottom navigation, full-screen editor
- Tablet: sidebar toggle, single pane by default
- Touch gestures: swipe left/right to toggle sidebars
- Touch-optimized toolbar (larger touch targets)
- Virtual keyboard handling (viewport adjustment)
- Font size bump for readability on small screens

### Task 6: notesaner-jbt — SSR/SSG Rendering for Public Notes
Server-rendered public note pages for SEO and performance.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Next.js App Router SSR for public note pages at /p/[slug]/[...path]
- ISR (Incremental Static Regeneration) with 5-minute revalidation
- Markdown rendered to HTML via unified/remark pipeline
- Syntax highlighting in code blocks
- Math rendering with KaTeX
- Navigation auto-generated from folder structure
- Table of contents from headings
- Breadcrumb navigation

## Project Info
- Next.js 15, React 19, shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS 4, Zustand, TanStack Query
- Project root: /Users/zeizel/projects/notesaner
- Frontend: apps/web/src/
- Features: apps/web/src/features/
- Collaboration: apps/web/src/features/collaboration/
- Editor: apps/web/src/features/editor/
- Workspace: apps/web/src/features/workspace/
- Shared stores: apps/web/src/shared/stores/
- Public vault pages would go in: apps/web/src/app/(public)/p/[slug]/

## Key Architecture Decisions
- Feature-Sliced Design
- CommentsPanel already exists as placeholder in panels/CommentsPanel.tsx
- useCollaborators hook already exists in features/collaboration/
- tabs-store.ts already manages tabs
- pane-store.ts manages split panes
- libs/markdown has full remark/unified pipeline for server-side rendering
- Backend publish API already serves public notes at GET /public/:slug/notes

Write tests where applicable.
summary: Comment display + properties editor + presence + tab history + mobile responsive + SSR publish
